'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 88''' is the eighty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]. ''It was released on [[September 3]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]
*[[Barada/Legends|Barada]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Dac/Legends|Dac]]
*[[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]]
*[[Decon III]]
*[[Fromm Tower Droid]]
*Leisure
*[[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry|Republic attack gunship]]
